items.name: Valentine's Day Cap 2014
items.description: Happy Valentine's Day 2014!

items.name: Putrid Green Head in A Jar
items.description: I don't know how you managed that, but I'm not helping you get back out.

items.name: Cap of Dreamers
items.description:
"We are the music-makers,
And we are the dreamers of dreams."

items.name: MLK Cap
items.description: "I have a dream that one day this nation will rise up and live out the true meaning of its creed: 'We hold these truths to be self-evident, that all men are created equal.'"

items.name: Trojan Infantry Helmet
items.description: This is Illium. Not Sparta.

items.name: The Locksmith's Secret
items.description: This top hat is capable of storing secrets. Just don’t forget where you put the key!

items.name: 2010 Party Cap
items.description: I'm gunna party like it's 1999?  Wait that's not right....

items.name: Butterfly Helmet - Lil Nas X (LNX)
items.description: Flutter your way into the end zone.

items.name: Stealin' Sam
items.description: This bandit is up to no good!

items.name: Halloween 2011 Paintball Cap
items.description: This at least proves that you know how to join a winning team and idle in their server while they carry you. Congrats.

items.name: Kikazaru
items.description: Hear no evil.

items.name: BreezeKreig Adventurer
items.description: You collected 1000 snow patches in BreezeKreig to land yourself this cool hat!

items.name: Sarge's Helmet
items.description: If anybody can do it - it's Sarge.

items.name: Black Knight Helmet
items.description: "THOU SHALL NOT PASS!"

items.name: French Brimmed Cap
items.description: Stylish and awesome!

items.name: Zipper Cap
items.description: This super fly backwards cap has got zippers on the front.  So you can fit all your important things in your hat pockets?

items.name: Expandiball
items.description: Ok impressive, you got your head in the ball - real question is, how do you get it out?

items.name: Spiked Cowhide Cap
items.description: Where the west and punk meet.

items.name: Halloween Baseball Cap 2014
items.description: Have a spooktacular day!

items.name: Christmas Baseball Cap
items.description: There's no baseball on Halloween and there's no baseball on Christmas. Who makes these things anyways?!

items.name: Police Sergeants Cap
items.description: A sergeant is a police officer who supervises an entire watch. Look out, evildoers!

items.name: Vegetables Cap
items.description: Who doesn't love vegetables!?!

items.name: B. W. Duckington
items.description: A classy cartoon duck from a simpler time...

items.name: Mining Helmet
items.description: You swing your pick at the rock. You decide to play Roblox instead.

items.name: Police Riot Helmet
items.description: He's tired of all the hippies and their protest signs.  He's here to enforce the law!

items.name: Sniper Relay Helmet
items.description: We've got a situation here.

items.name: Newsboy Cap
items.description: Extra, extra, read all about it! Newsboy cap now on sale!

items.name: Joyful Bell Helmet
items.description: You performed each of the jobs in the ROBLOX Holiday edition of Work at a Pizza Place at least 5 times. Excellent work!

items.name: Plain Leather Military Cap
items.description: A simple cap, but the mind under it is anything but simple.

items.name: Valentine's Day 2011 Cap
items.description: Love is all you need.
